languages.text: "Вы больше чепуху слушайте! Бог-Император на стороне Его Сиятельства".

traits.locale_text: "Вы больше чепуху слушайте! Бог-Император на стороне Его Сиятельства".

languages.text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."
languages.original_text: "Вы больше чепуху слушайте! Бог-Император на стороне Его Сиятельства".

traits.locale_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."
"Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."
"Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

languages.text: "Das ist törichtes Geschwätz. Der Gottimperator steht an der Seite Seiner Lordschaft."
languages.original_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist törichtes Geschwätz. Der Gottimperator steht an der Seite Seiner Lordschaft."

languages.text: “净听信一些蠢话！神皇可是站在大人这边的。”
languages.original_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

traits.locale_text: “净听信一些蠢话！神皇可是站在大人这边的。”

languages.text: « Encore ces inepties ! L'Empereur-Dieu est du côté de Sa Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

traits.locale_text: « Encore ces inepties ! L'Empereur-Dieu est du côté de Sa Seigneurie. »

languages.text: «¡La de sandeces que hay que oír! El Dios Emperador está del lado de mi señor».
languages.original_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

traits.locale_text: «¡La de sandeces que hay que oír! El Dios Emperador está del lado de mi señor».

languages.text: "Böyle aptalca laflara maruz kalmak... Tanrı İmparator, Lord Hazretleri'nin yanında."
languages.original_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle aptalca laflara maruz kalmak... Tanrı İmparator, Lord Hazretleri'nin yanında."

languages.text: 「愚かな話に耳を傾けるな！神帝は殿の側にある。」
languages.original_text: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."

traits.locale_text: 「愚かな話に耳を傾けるな！神帝は殿の側にある。」
